steps.title: Read the slope direction
steps.content: The line of best fit rises from left to right, so its slope is positive. That eliminates equations with slope $-1$.

steps.title: Read the intercept sign
steps.content: The line crosses the y-axis above $0$, around $3.4$. The equation with positive slope and positive y-intercept is $y=x+3.4$. The answer is A.
